title: selaginella firmula
intro: Selaginella firmula, also known as Indian spikenard or false spikenard, is a type of plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family and is a member of the group of plants known as spike mosses. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella firmula include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Selaginella firmula can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
